info.title: GlideDesign API
info.description: GlideDesign backend for AI product design, publishing, exports, billing, and orchestration.

get.description:
Prometheus scrape endpoint. Open in dev; gated by ``METRICS_TOKEN`` when set.

Rationale: when the ``/metrics`` endpoint is publicly routable (production),
we require ``Authorization: Bearer <METRICS_TOKEN>``. Compared with
``hmac.compare_digest`` to avoid timing leaks. In dev/CI, ``METRICS_TOKEN`` is
empty and the endpoint stays open so local Prometheus / scrape probes work
without extra config.

schema.title: Response Stripe Webhook Api V1 Billing Webhook Post

get.description: Recent Stripe invoices for this organization (empty if not a Stripe customer).

post.description: Stripe Checkout for first purchase from Free / trial, or in-place prorated upgrade.
Schedule downgrade at Stripe period end — no Stripe API call yet (cron applies).
Cancel pending scheduled downgrade (GlideDesign-side row).
Cancel Stripe subscription at period end (retain access until then).
Undo cancel-at-period-end before the period ends.

post.description:
Accept a form submission for a **live** published page.

Matches the public URL shape ``/p/{org}/{page}`` — same org and page slugs as publish.
Supports ``application/json`` or ``application/x-www-form-urlencoded``.

get.description:
Return **200** if ``domain`` is a verified custom hostname; **404** otherwise.

Caddy should call this over private networking. If ``CADDY_INTERNAL_TOKEN`` is set,
require header ``X-Forge-Caddy-Token`` to match.

Response Health Ready Health Ready Get

get.description: Backward-compatible liveness (BI-02: prefer ``/health/live``).
Structured dependency checks — gated like ``/metrics`` when ``METRICS_TOKEN`` is set (AL-01).

StudioGenerateContinueRequest.title: StudioGenerateContinueRequest
StudioGenerateContinueRequest.description: Follow-up generation after clarify chip — same pipeline as `/generate` with locked workflow.

prompt.title: Prompt
examples: Small jobs booking page for Reds Construction

forced_workflow.title: Forced Workflow
forced_workflow.description: Optional — user disambiguation overrides auto intent for this generation. Use page-backed types (e.g. contact-form, survey, quiz, coming_soon, resume, link_in_bio, gallery) or marketing keys from /workflows.

session_id.title: Session Id
session_id.description: Client-side Studio session key for grouped attachments (P-05).

vision_attachment_ids.title: Vision Attachment Ids
vision_attachment_ids.description: Registered studio_attachments to include as vision context (max 5).

html.title: Html
html.description: Optional; server extracts from page when omitted.

next_before.title: Next Before
next_before.description: If set, pass as `before` to fetch the next page.

SubmissionOut.title: SubmissionOut
SubmissionOut.description: Tenant-scoped submission row for Studio / admin tables.

SubmissionPatchBody.title: SubmissionPatchBody
SubmissionPatchBody.description: Admin update to a submission row.

page_type.title: Page Type
page_type.description: Hint from intent_json.page_type for workflow browsing (P-06).

migrate_from.title: Migrate From
migrate_from.description: Competitor tools this template replaces (gallery cohort filter, P-08).

studio_path.title: Studio Path
studio_path.description: Relative app path to open Studio with the new page.

UserMePatch.description: Profile fields saved from Settings; timezone/locale live in `preferences` JSONB.

credit_confirm_threshold_cents.title: Credit Confirm Threshold Cents
credit_confirm_threshold_cents.description: Pre-action modal when estimate exceeds threshold (cents USD equivalent for comparison).

credit_confirm_skip_under_credits.title: Credit Confirm Skip Under Credits
credit_confirm_skip_under_credits.description: Never show confirm modal when estimate is under this credit count (unless session cap breach).
